summary.what: Surface the off-first-parent anchor note in timbers pending at count:0
summary.why: A bare 'No pending commits' when the anchor is off the first-parent line conflates 'clean' with 'computed from an off-line anchor' — naming the situation + pointing at --explain/--range removes the ambiguity osprey flagged
summary.how: Added a conditional note in outputPendingHuman's count:0 branch keyed on AnchorOffFirstParentLine
